name: Jindal Stainless Limited
summary: Jindal Stainless Limited manufactures and sells stainless steel products in India and internationally. The company provides ferro alloys, slabs, hot rolled coils, plates and sheets, and cold rolled coils and sheets. Its products are used in automobile, railway, household/durables, building and construction, nuclear, and processing industries. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in New Delhi, India.
